text:
the mcp-diff tool detects when your MCP server's tool schema changes between deploys.

pip install mcp-diff
mcp-diff old.json new.json

if a description changes, your CI pipeline knows before your users do.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend

why does a description change matter?

because agents route tool selection by description semantics. if you change "Retrieve user data" to "Get user information", some agents will route differently.

schema changes are behavioral changes. mcp-diff surfaces them.

the 5-tool MCP developer lifecycle:

1. agent-friend (lint schema quality)
2. mcp-patch (remove security antipatterns)
3. mcp-pytest (test tool behavior)
4. mcp-snoop (debug runtime calls)
5. mcp-diff (catch deploy changes)

all on PyPI. all open source.
